
+--[  Auth Flow  ]---+
|  +--------------+  |
|  |  Login Form  |  |
|  +-------+------+  |
|          |         |
|       submit       |
|          v         |
| +----------------+ |
| |  Authenticate  | |
| +--------+-------+ |
+----------|---------+
           |
        success
           v
    +-------------+
    |  Dashboard  |
    +-------------+
